category_sources: Official GitHub repository description says it converts profiling output to a dot graph.
source_facts.description says gprof2dot converts profiler output into a Graphviz dot graph.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is gprof2dot.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains command-line options, examples, FAQ, and output documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository, and the GitHub page is the upstream source-control project.
tags_sources: Official README documents profiler formats and dot output examples.
source_facts.description mentions profilers and Graphviz dot graphs.
